name: tweetflow
description: Twitter/X workflow skills that auto-install opencli on first use and guide browser setup when needed.

interface.shortDescription: Twitter/X workflow skills with automatic opencli runtime setup.
interface.longDescription: TweetFlow auto-installs opencli on first use, exposes reusable Twitter/X workflow skills, and guides Browser Bridge plus login setup for browser-backed actions.
defaultPrompt: Run TweetFlow setup and tell me what is missing.
Review 50 timeline tweets and draft the top 3 replies.
Read a tweet URL, write a short judgment, and post it.
